data.title: Advance Auto Parts releases Q4 and full year 2025 results, unveils 2026 guidance, showing progress on strategic plan.
data.description: According to recent reports, the number of new COVID-19 cases has reached a record high, with over 200,000 new cases reported in the last 24 hours. Additionally, the death toll has increased significantly, with over 3,000 new fatalities reported. These alarming numbers highlight the ongoing severity of the pandemic and emphasize the importance of following safety guidelines to prevent further spread of the virus. Authorities are urging the public to continue practicing social distancing, wearing masks, and getting vaccinated to help curb the transmission of COVID-19.

data.title: Immunic raises USD 200 million in private placement, with potential for up to USD 200 million more. Funds to support Phase 3 trials and transition to commercial-stage company.
data.description: An initial sum of $200 million has been received upfront, with the possibility of an additional $200 million in proceeds. This funding is anticipated to cover the costs associated with finalizing the Phase 3 ENSURE trials for relapsing multiple sclerosis, commencing the Phase 3 trial for primary progressive multiple sclerosis, and facilitating the transition into the next phase of the project.

data.title: Crypto company CEO receives 20-year sentence for scamming $200M in Bitcoin Ponzi scheme from 2019 to 2021.
data.description: Ramil Palafox, the founder of PGI, has been sentenced by a federal judge to 20 years in prison. This decision comes as a result of his involvement in a Bitcoin Ponzi scheme that managed to raise more than $200 million from customers over the span of 2019 to 2021.

data.title: Elkem clarifies details on NOK 1.5 billion underwritten equity issue through bookbuilding process.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway on February 13, 2026, Elkem provided further details regarding the NOK 1.5 billion underwritten equity issue that was announced earlier that day at 07:00. This equity issue will be carried out through a publicly disclosed bookbuilding process.

data.title: Essent Group (NYSE: ESNT) Q4 earnings miss estimates by -8.05%. EPS $1.6 vs. $1.74, revenue down $2.62M YoY.
data.description: Essent Group, listed on the NYSE as ESNT, released its Q4 financial results on February 13, 2026, at 06:30 AM. The report revealed that the company fell short of projected earnings by -8.05%, with an EPS of $1.6 compared to the estimated $1.74. Additionally, their revenue decreased by $2.62 million from the corresponding period in the previous year. This downturn follows a trend from the previous quarter where Essent Group also failed to meet expectations. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CLIQ Digital's 2025 sales decreased by 46% y/y to €132m, with 4Q sales declining by 43% q/q to €12m. Customer acquisition costs decreased by 62% to €28m y/y. EBITDA for the year was -€6m (-163%) and -€4m for 4Q.
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, the CLIQ Group experienced a 43% decrease in sales compared to the previous quarter, amounting to €12 million. The full year sales for 2025 also saw a decline of 46% year-on-year, totaling €132 million. The total customer acquisition costs were €1 million in the fourth quarter and €28 million for the entire year, marking a significant decrease of 62% compared to the previous year.The EBITDA for the year 2025 was reported to be -€6 million, reflecting a 163% decrease, while the fourth quarter showed an EBITDA of -€4 million. The company, based in Düsseldorf, announced these preliminary unaudited financial results on 13 February 2026. The finalized audited 2025 Annual Report is set to be released on 5 March 2026 and will be made available on CLIQ Group's official website at https://cliqdigital.com/investors/financialreporting. This is as reported by Benzinga.com.

data.title: Essent Group Ltd. reported Q4 2025 net income of $155M vs $167.9M in Q4 2024. Full-year 2025 net income was $690M vs $729.4M in 2024. The Board increased quarterly dividend to $0.35 per share. Mortgage Insurance new written was $11.8B in Q4 2025. Share repurchase included 9.9M shares for $576M in 2025. Conference call scheduled for more details.
data.description: Essent Group Ltd. reported a net income of $155.0 million or $1.60 per diluted share for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, compared to $167.9 million or $1.58 per diluted share for the same quarter in 2024. For the full year 2025, net income was $690.0 million or $6.90 per diluted share, compared to $729.4 million or $6.85 per diluted share in 2024. Essent also declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.35 per common share, payable on March 23, 2026. The company returned nearly $700 million to shareholders in 2025 through dividends and repurchases, retiring almost 10% of its outstanding shares. Mortgage Insurance new insurance written for Q4 2025 was $11.8 billion, while Mortgage Insurance in force as of December 31, 2025, was $248.4 billion. Essent also entered into reinsurance agreements during Q4 2025 and repurchased 9.9 million common shares for $576 million in 2025. The company will hold a conference call to discuss its results, acknowledging the challenges and successes faced in 2025.

data.title: TC Energy reports strong operational and financial performance for 2025, including 15 flow records. Q4 2025: Comparable EBITDA of $3.0 billion, net income $1.0 billion. 26th year dividend growth, 2026 outlook raises EBITDA to $11.6-11.8 billion. Numerous planned projects to drive growth.
data.description: TC Energy Corporation announced strong safety performance, achieving 15 flow records and solid financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025. The company saw a 13% YoY increase in Q4 comparable EBITDA to $3.0 billion, and a 15% increase in segmented earnings. They approved a 3.2% dividend increase for the 26th consecutive year. Full-year 2025 saw comparable EBITDA of $11.0 billion and segmented earnings of $8.0 billion. The Board approved a quarterly common share dividend of $0.8775. In 2026, TC Energy anticipates higher comparable EBITDA and EPS, with EBITDA expected to be $11.6 to $11.8 billion and capital expenditures of $6.0 to $6.5 billion. Operational highlights included record deliveries in Natural Gas Pipelines in both Canada and the US. Project highlights include sanctioning $0.6 billion for expansion projects. Key financial figures for 2025 include net income of $959 million, segmented earnings totaling $8.0 billion, and comparable EBITDA of $11.0 billion. The company continues commercial discussions for future growth opportunities. For a detailed breakdown of financials and operational achievements, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cameco announces solid Q4 and 2025 results, plans disciplined supply strategy in response to increasing market demand.
data.description: In its latest financial report, Cameco (CCO on TSX; CCJ on NYSE) announced consolidated results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025. These results align with International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS). The company showcased disciplined performance in its uranium, fuel services, and Westinghouse segments throughout the year. This reflects their robust strategy in a dynamic market environment. Cameco's achievements in these areas underscore its ongoing success and adherence to IFRS guidelines.

data.title: Microsoft Corp (MSFT) is lagging behind Meta Platforms Inc (META) in AI stock returns, with MSFT rising 61.26% ($249.18 to $401.84) and META surging 454.07% ($110.67 to $649.81) since ChatGPT launch.
data.description: Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) has emerged as a surprise laggard among leading hyperscalers due to its underperformance in the AI sector despite a multi-billion dollar investment. Since the launch of ChatGPT on Nov. 30, 2022, Microsoft's stock has risen by 61.26% to $401.84 apiece, trailing behind Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META), which saw a 454.07% surge to $649.81 during the same period. This shift has caught the attention of investors and analysts, with venture capitalist Chamath Palihapitiya highlighting Microsoft's struggle in relation to its competitors. This data indicates a significant performance gap between the two tech giants in the AI market.

data.title: Emily Bao reveals 2026 roadmap at Solana event: 24/7 trading coming to DEX, Consensus 2026 digital asset innovation discussed.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on February 13, 2026, during the Consensus 2026 event, Byreal co-founder Emily Bao announced their protocol's detailed strategic plan for the year. The roadmap, revealed at Solana Accelerate APAC, focuses on three key pillars aiming to drive digital asset innovation. The event gathered key figures in the field, highlighting the importance of collaboration and advancement in the rapidly evolving industry.

data.title: Huey Magoo's opens new location in Miami, FL, offering hand-crafted chicken tenders to more guests. Rapid expansion continues.
data.description: A popular chicken tenders brand is rapidly expanding, providing customers with new options for customization such as hand-breaded and grilled choices, house-made sauces, and other menu items made in-house. This news comes from Miami on Feb. 13, 2026. Huey Magoo's is unveiling these offerings as part of their growth, aiming to cater to a wider audience. With a focus on quality and variety, they are set to revolutionize the chicken tenders industry. Stay tuned for more updates on their increasing success.

data.title: Cosign guarantor platform expands to Valdosta, improves renter access, addresses rising rents. - Feb. 13, 2026
data.description: A new guarantor platform called Cosign has been introduced in Valdosta, Georgia on February 13, 2026. As rental prices continue to increase in the market, this platform aims to address outdated approval measures and assist in filling units. Cosign serves as a third-party service that aims to broaden renter opportunities while also safeguarding property owners. This initiative comes amidst a rise in rents, providing relief to landlords as they seek suitable tenants. By streamlining the approval process, Cosign offers a solution to the challenges faced by both renters and property owners in the current rental market.

data.title: Hyperscale Data declares monthly dividends of $0.2708333 per Series D share and $0.20833 per Series E share, on Feb 13, 2026.
data.description: Hyperscale Data has announced its declaration of a monthly cash dividend of $0.20833 per share for its 10.00% Series E Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock. The company, identified as Hyperscale Data, Inc., is listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbol GPUS. This news was released on Feb. 13, 2026, indicating the company's position as an artificial intelligence ("AI") data center entity based in Las Vegas.

data.title: Entertainment Earth celebrates 30th anniversary by honoring leading toy retailers at Toy Fair; retailers shaping industry future.
data.description: In Los Angeles on February 13, 2026, Entertainment Earth marked its 30th anniversary by honoring independent toy retailers who are influencing the future of the toy industry. This event coincides with the start of New York Toy Fair.

data.title: Sister cities Penza, Le Mans, and Merri-bek send New Year wishes to Xianyang, China amidst Chinese New Year celebrations.
data.description: As the Chinese New Year of the Horse draws near, sister cities from various countries, such as Penza in Russia, Le Mans in France, and Merri-bek (formerly Moreland) in Australia, have conveyed their warm greetings to Xianyang. This exchange of festive wishes highlights the global connections and cultural celebrations surrounding this lunar festival. The participation of these international sister cities underscores the significance and reach of Chinese New Year traditions, with Xianyang serving as a focal point for cultural exchange. This showcases the international relationships nurtured through cultural events, with diverse regions joining in the celebrations.

data.title: Volue welcomes TA Associates as their new strategic investor, joining Advent International, Generation Investment Management, and Arendals Fossekompani.
data.description: Volue, a prominent player in electrification and energy technology, revealed that TA Associates, a renowned global private equity firm, has become a strategic investor along with existing investors Advent International, Generation Investment Management, and Arendals Fossekompani. In the last year and a half, Volue has strategically pivoted its attention towards the energy industry by divesting non-essential operations. This move signifies a new direction for the company as it solidifies its position in the market.
